utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well can you at least stay to the end of the play ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I mean , I will go to the airport with you , I ... I wanna say good bye .

utterances.speaker: Kate
utterances.text: Flight in an hour . I ... I gotta go .

emotion_cause.span: 5_Flight in an hour . I ... I gotta go .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Listen , I ah , I gotta say good bye , and ... and I gotta say it quick cause this is killing me .

emotion_cause.span: 10_I gotta say good bye , and ... and I gotta say it quick cause this is killing me .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: One thing you gotta know , is that I will never forget you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But , you have got things you have to do now , and so do I .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And so ... I am gonna get on this spaceship , and I am gonna go to Blargon 7 in search of alternative fuels .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But when I return , 200 years from now , you will be long gone .

emotion_cause.span: 14_when I return , 200 years from now , you will be long gone .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But I will not have aged at all .

emotion_cause.span: 14_when I return , 200 years from now , you will be long gone .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: So you tell your great ... great ... granddaughter to look me up , because Adrienne , baby , I am gonna want to meet her .

emotion_cause.span: 14_when I return , 200 years from now , you will be long gone .
14_when I return , 200 years from now , you will be long gone .
